channel.title: waapply
channel.description: Latest Artificial Intelligence news and editorial summaries.

item.title: Elon Musk Says 'If AI/Robots Increase Output, Then You Must Issue?
item.description: Elon Musk has argued that federally funded checks delivering a universal high income are his preferred response to job losses tied to artificial intelligence,?

item.title: Do AI Agent Costs Grow Exponentially? I Ran My Logs and the Answer?
item.description: A Hacker News thread with 208 points asks whether AI agent costs grow exponentially. I have months of real production logs. The answer isn't what anyone?

item.title: Promising Artificial Intelligence Stocks To Watch Today - April 18th
item.description: Hut 8, Tempus AI, SoundHound AI, Upstart, and BigBear.ai are the five Artificial Intelligence stocks to watch today, according to MarketBeat's stock screener?

item.title: Meta layoffs: 16,000 jobs on the line as Mark Zuckerberg plans major?

item.title: Build a Secure, Always-On Local AI Agent with OpenClaw and NVIDIA?
item.description: Agents are evolving from question-and-answer systems into long-running autonomous assistants that read files, call APIs, and drive multi-step workflows.?

item.title: Monzo founder makes dark prediction about your job in AI future
item.description: The future job market doesn't look very bright, according to Tom Blomfield, who believes that artificial intelligence will make a host of roles redundant. The?
